rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 30, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF MICKEY WONG's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To File 3rd Amended Complt; Memo Of P&A GRANTED as follows: (1) Plaintiff shall file and serve Third Amended Complaint no later than June 5, 2013; (2) Third Amended Complaint shall be properly verified; (3) Third Amended Complaint shall explain in good faith inconsistencies between allegations in Second Amended Complaint paragraphs 106-107 and proposed Third Amended Complaint paragraph 87. rulings.Case Title: THERESA LYNNE MURPHY VS. WILLIAM S. COLEMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injuction To Enjoin Defendants From Selling The Property At Trustees Sale
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 30, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF THERESA MURPHY's Motion For Preliminary Injuction To Enjoin Defendants From Selling The Property At Trustees Sale DENIED. Plaintiff fails to show she will be prevailing party. Defendants' Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. It appears that Plaintiff became the title owner of the property encumbered by Deeds of Trust executed on December 21, 2005. (See Default Judgments in cases CGC-07-467019 and CGC-08-473479). MERS was nominee for the beneficiary/successor beneficiary and successfully prosecuted an action against Plaintiff on behalf of JP Morgan Chase as Trustee. (See Judgment in case CGC-08-473479 filed on August 2, 2010). Bank of New York Mellon, as Trustee did not have interest in the premises on January 25, 2012. (See Judgment in case CGC-11-509264). Bank of New York Mellon is the beneficiary of Corporate Assignment dated December 10, 2012 grating it interest in the Property. Bank of New York Mellon substituted Trustee and Trustee recorded a Notice of Default on February 12, 2013. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHELDON FONG VS. EAST WEST BANK
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 30, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT K CHENG, DANIEL CHAN, EAST WEST BANK TREASURY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, and EAST WEST BANK's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH FINAL LEAVE TO AMEND as to (1, 17 and 18) wrongful foreclosure, quiet title, slander of title-to allege standing at the time of foreclosure; payment pursuant to NOI, NOD or NTS or authorization to withdraw such payment from P's accounts; verification (2 and 4) negligence - to allege duty and specify loans referred to; (3, 5, 6, 12, 16) common counts, unjust enrichment, conversion and elder abuse, UCL violation- to allege all elements of these causes of action; (7 and 13) fraud and misrepresentation - to allege fraud with requisite specificity; (8) constructive fraud-to allege facts supporting existence of fiduciary relationship and allege fraud with specificity; (11) injunctive relief- to allege as remedy; SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to (9, 10, 14, 15) breach of fiduciary duty and duty of loyalty; IIED; breach of contract. Demurrer based on CCP 430.10(d) is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Defendants' counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)
